verdict: Stephen Curry is an elite, high-impact point guard who significantly boosts team success and playoff probability.
strengths: He demonstrates exceptional efficiency (1.767 ER), adding over 9 wins and consistently elevating his team into playoff contention.
concern: The data indicates no major performance concerns; his trend signal is steady and his impact remains elite.
recommendation: Sign him immediately; his requested $20M salary is an outstanding value, significantly below his fair market price.
audio_summary: Stephen Curry is an elite point guard, projected to add over 9 wins and lead teams to nearly 50 wins with a 93% playoff probability. His requested $20M salary is a tremendous bargain compared to his $35M fair value, making him a must-sign asset.
